title: selaginella lepida
intro: Selaginella lepida, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, which is a group of small, non-vascular plants that resemble mosses. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella lepida include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
